title: Error converting JSON to binary for OpenAI Transcribe
symptom: When attempting to convert JSON data to binary for the OpenAI Transcribe node, an error occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'split')'.
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different node or context
root_cause: The error indicates that the code is trying to access a property of an undefined variable, likely due to the JSON data not being properly formatted or the expected structure not being met before the conversion attempt.
fix_steps: Ensure the JSON data is correctly formatted and contains the expected properties.
Use the HTTP Request node to retrieve the file instead of relying on the previous node's output.
agent_instruction: Check the JSON structure and use the HTTP Request node to fetch the file for conversion.
